title: Alerts / Toasts
description: Toast notifications appear fixed at the top-right corner of the screen. They stack when multiple are active and auto-dismiss after 4 seconds. Text is always dynamic.

variants.title: Changes saved
variants.text: Your settings have been updated successfully.

variants.title: Copied to clipboard
variants.text: The tracking link has been copied.

variants.title: Something went wrong
variants.text: We couldn't process your request. Please try again.

variants.title: Upload failed
variants.text: The file exceeds the maximum size of 10 MB.

variants.title: Action required
variants.text: Your session is about to expire in 5 minutes.

variants.title: Unsaved changes
variants.text: You have unsaved changes that will be lost.

variants.title: Update available
variants.text: A new version of the app is ready to install.

variants.title: Order exported
variants.text: 25 orders have been exported to CSV.

variants.title: Sync complete
variants.text: All records are up to date.

variants.title: Processing orders
variants.text: This may take a few seconds.
